global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple gradient background with 3D shapes and clear call-to-action elements.
global.main_message: Promoting a travel app for booking hotels and flights.

elements.label: Gradient purple background
elements.description: A smooth gradient background transitioning from dark to light purple.

elements.label: 3D geometric shapes
elements.description: Stylized 3D geometric shapes resembling buildings or hotels, colored in light shades of purple and white.

elements.label: App interface preview
elements.description: A simplified app interface displayed in a rectangular shape, showcasing a flight and hotel booking feature.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rectangular button with rounded corners, featuring the text 'Get offer' in a bold, readable font.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Large, bold text reading 'RouteBloon' positioned prominently at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small decorative icon, possibly a shield or badge, located at the bottom left corner.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: Another small decorative icon, similar to the previous one, located near the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Secondary headline text
elements.description: Text stating 'Fly smarter Hotels flights in one tap' in a smaller font, positioned centrally below the main headline.

elements.label: Descriptive text
elements.description: Text providing additional information about the service, placed below the main headline.
elements.text_content: Fly smarter Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A button with the text 'Get offer', designed to attract user interaction.
